completed_packets.summary: Added a common harness manifest/result/replay contract, mock harness runner, validation flags, schema catalog entries, live Hermes/OpenClaw/Coven smoke publication hooks, and focused regression coverage.

latest_risks: Real Hermes, OpenClaw, and Coven runtimes were not launched in this packet; coverage uses mock and artifact-writer paths.
The dedicated worktree did not include the broader autonomous docs/state files from the shared checkout, so this branch starts its own scoped state handoff.

next_packets.summary: Add fixture-backed replay matrix coverage across Hermes-style observer, OpenClaw, and Coven harness outputs.
